playbook.intent: Alert at 3am → root-caused, mitigated, postmortem-documented incident for one person without SRE rotation.
playbook.scope: Solo founder runs incident response designed for one person: alert to mitigation to postmortem, without an SRE rotation. Exit artifact is a green prod + blameless postmortem + followup backlog entry.

stage.name: Triage
stage.intent: Acknowledge, scope impact, decide stop-the-bleed action.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when stop-the-bleed action is chosen. Refuse to investigate before bleeding stops.

stage.name: Mitigate
stage.intent: Stop the bleed. Diagnosis comes later.

tasks.task: Communicate ETA to customers if needed

stage.decision-gate: Advance when monitoring is green again. Stay if mitigation incomplete.

stage.name: Investigate
stage.decision-gate: Advance when root cause is named. Refuse to write postmortem with 'cause unknown'.

stage.name: Postmortem
stage.intent: Blameless. What happened, why, what changes.
stage.decision-gate: Required output: postmortem within 48h. Without it, the same incident recurs.

extra.value: [Multi-team incident command — single operator only, PR / public status comms — separate stakeholder-communication playbook]
[Monitoring + alerting configured (monitoring-logging complete), Sentry / equivalent error tracking live, Deploy + rollback path proven (deploy-day playbook done)]
[Investigating before mitigating — extends bleeding for diagnosis purity, Skipping postmortem because incident felt small — small ones recur fastest]
['If I get paged for the same root cause next month, will I find this postmortem?', 'Is the followup actually in the backlog, or only mentioned in the postmortem?']

{human: faion get-content solo-prod-incident-response --format md, agent: faion get-content solo-prod-incident-response --format context, json: faion get-content solo-prod-incident-response --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
